timing_policy.GER_Bundesliga: dual-surface profile passed opening and closing retrospective timing checks
timing_policy.FRA_Ligue1: dual-surface profile passed opening and closing retrospective timing checks
timing_policy.POR_PrimeiraLiga: only the 1X2-only profile is authorized for arbitrary question-time shadow use; dual-surface profile failed opening score Top1 gate

profile_isolation: Never mix rows produced under different registry/profile hashes or different frozen profile names.
multiple_question_time_policy: Multiple captures for one match may be retained as evidence, but promotion-readiness scoring counts only the earliest valid freeze under the same profile hash.
note: This protocol produces prospective challenger readiness evidence only. A later CURRENT-authorized promotion receipt is still required for any formal weight or probability change.
